specific_location: NE pond of Sawhill Ponds complex--southeast corner by duck blind
description: small (for heron-type) size; golden brown plumage with dark back and cap; bright yellow iris; stout golden-orange bill, duskier at the tip; long legs and long thick neck that when extended was almost as long as the body.Behavior: mainly in freeze posture while standing in the open(!), but occasionally foraging for a fishCall: NAPlumage: adult, probably female
